title: RELEVANCE OF IMPROVING THE PROCEDURE FOR RECOGNIZING DOCUMENTS ON EDUCATION IN FOREIGN STATES
author: Ummatov, Mukhammadrasul
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Improving the procedure for obtaining documents on education in foreign countries in Uzbekistan is of great importance for the globalization and economic development of our country's education system, and this article examines the relevance of this issue from a scientific and practical point of view. The study analyzes in detail the current state of the procedure for recognizing foreign diplomas, including procedures based on Resolution No. 620 of 2019, the system of electronic application and testing, and also considers such problems as bureaucratic delays, corruption risks, and low transparency.
